name: obsidian-vault-server-sync
description: Lightweight CouchDB sync for Obsidian vaults

scripts.build:release: mkdir -p dist/release && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --external:obsidian --external:electron --external:@codemirror/* --external:@lezer/* --format=cjs --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/release/main.js --define:global=globalThis --minify && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/release/ 2>/dev/null; true
